title: Raygun Deployment
description: Schema for a Raygun deployment resource — the release marker correlated with error groups via the Raygun Public v3 API.

version.description: Release version string (e.g. semver or build number).

ownerName.description: Name of the person or system that pushed the deploy.

scmIdentifier.description: Source-control commit SHA the deployment was built from.

scmType.description: Source-control provider used for the source link integration.

scmAccountIdentifier.description: Account or organization slug in the configured SCM.
